definition:
1. to measure by rule , (Euripides): —;Pass., with future middle -ήσομαι, to be measured, estimated , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. as Dep. (see. σταθμόω); to estimate  distance or size, without actual measurement, (Herdotus Historicus): metaphorically to estimate  one thing by  another, τί τινι (Plato Philosophus); absolute to conjecture , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
3. to attach weight to  a thing, value  it, (Plato Philosophus) (ML)
